front: Short Story: Arnold Friend drives a gold jalopy painted with 'DONE BY CRAZY WOMAN DRIVER' and 'MAN THE FLYING SAUCERS' to abduct 15-year-old Connie
back: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?" (Joyce Carol Oates)
work: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?"

front: Short Story: the numbers 33, 19, and 17 are inscribed on Arnold Friend's car as a 'secret code' that is never explained
back: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?" (Joyce Carol Oates)
work: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?"

front: Short Story: dedicated to Bob Dylan; inspired after listening to 'It's All Over Now, Baby Blue' and by serial killings in Tucson, Arizona
back: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?" (Joyce Carol Oates)
work: "Where Are You Going, Where Have You Been?"

front: Novel: fictionalizes Marilyn Monroe's life, replacing real names with designations like 'The Ex-Athlete,' 'Playwright,' and 'R.F.'
Novel: mirrors Chappaquiddick; 'The Senator' kills Kelly Kelleher in a car accident; protagonist imagines the title substance pumped from her stomach
Novel: the Wendall family struggles in Detroit; Jules pimps out a girl and commits murder during the Detroit Race Riot
Novel: Gideon crashes a bomb-laden plane into the title family's mansion; four-year-old Germaine is a psychic; part of a 'Gothic Saga'
Novel: Legs Sadovsky and the Wirtz sisters form a female gang in Hammond, New York to put abusive men on trial
Novel: Marianne's refusal to press charges after a sexual assault tears apart a rural New York family from Mt. Ephraim
back: We Were the Mulvaneys (Joyce Carol Oates)

front: Author: wrote a version of Chekhov's 'The Lady with the Pet Dog' from Anna Sergeyevna's perspective, set partly in Albany
Novel: Clara Walpole's rise out of poverty in a work titled after a Bosch triptych; part of the Wonderland Quartet set in Eden County
back: A Garden of Earthly Delights (Joyce Carol Oates)
